case_title: RUBIO, SANTOS ALBINA et al VS HOADY, MIKE HOADY RECOVERABLE FAMILY TRUST.

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE DATE REQUESTED FEB.21, 2002 3:30PM $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-14-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-21-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
